description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image with a single build job in the build stage. The build job runs a before_script that executes uname -a, apt update, installs gfortran-12 and sets it as the default, installs make, autoconf, automake, autotools-dev, libtool, pkg-config, git, python3-dev, libboost-all-dev, valgrind, and runs ldconfig. Then its script runs ./autogen.sh --enable-memory-tests, pushes into tools/runtime-env, builds the runtime-env target with make, returns to the previous directory, and finally runs make -j $(nproc) check. Define a CXXFLAGS variable with value -Wunused-parameter. Configure the pipeline workflow to run only on merge request events, on tag pushes, or when the commit branch equals the default branch.
